analyst_notes: FILE PATH FIX VALIDATED: The new assertion 'reads_skill_references' PASSES. Agent successfully read PLANS.md, references/execution-plan.md, references/validation.md, and references/cross-review.md from the skill directory. The top-level path clarification in SKILL.md and the split Quick Reference table resolved the confusion.
HIGHEST PASS RATE YET: 87.5% (7/8 assertions), up from 75% in iteration 5 and 71.4% in iteration 4.
SPEED IMPROVEMENT: with_skill was FASTER than without_skill (418s vs 522s), suggesting the structured workflow helps the agent work more efficiently rather than wandering.

DELEGATION GAP PERSISTS: The only failing assertion is delegates_to_subagent. This is partly due to the test setup — the feature was already implemented, so the agent verified and documented instead of delegating new implementation. For a truly clean test, the project should have the delete endpoint removed.

PERSISTENT FAILURE: delegates_to_subagent has failed in every iteration. This may need a different approach — either modify the skill to be more explicit about when delegation is mandatory vs optional, or design a test where the feature genuinely needs to be built from scratch.
